headerDisplay:
## TTLock Platform v2026 for Homebridge

**Important:** For setup instructions, please see the project [GitHub Page](https://github.com/itsJumaah/homebridge-ttlock-v2026).

clientid.title: Client ID
clientid.description: The Client ID for your TTLock developer account.

clientsecret.title: Client Secret
clientsecret.description: The Client Secret for your TTLock developer account.

username.title: Username
username.description: The username for the TTLock User associated with your developer account - with the prefix returned by the TTLock API

password.title: Password (md5 hashed)
password.description: The password for the TTLock User associated with your developer account - md5 hashed.

batteryLowLevel.title: Low battery warning threshold level (in percent)
batteryLowLevel.description: The battery level percentage at which a low battery warning will be displayed in the HomeKit status.

maximumApiRetry.title: Maximum amount of retries
maximumApiRetry.description: The amount of attempts to call the TTLock API. Useful if you do not want to repeat failed lock/unlock attempts after a long timeout delay.

stateCacheSeconds.title: Lock state cache duration
stateCacheSeconds.description: How long to reuse the last lock state before calling TTLock again. Use 0 to disable state caching.

batteryCacheMinutes.title: Battery cache duration
batteryCacheMinutes.description: How long to reuse the last battery level before calling TTLock again.

apiTimeoutSeconds.title: API read timeout
apiTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout for TTLock state, battery, token, and discovery API calls.

commandTimeoutSeconds.title: Lock command timeout
commandTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout for TTLock lock and unlock commands.

commandConfirmDelaySeconds.title: Command confirmation delay
commandConfirmDelaySeconds.description: How long to wait after a successful lock/unlock command before confirming the real lock state. Use 0 to disable confirmation.

gatewayBusyBackoffSeconds.title: Gateway busy backoff
gatewayBusyBackoffSeconds.description: How long to pause new lock/unlock commands after TTLock reports the gateway is busy.
